title: Google’s New AI Just Broke The AI Speed Limit: DiffusionGemma
summary: Google released DiffusionGemma, an open AI model that generates text using a different approach and achieves up to four times faster inference on dedicated GPUs. The model features a 256-token canvas and self-correction capabilities.
writeup: The video covers DiffusionGemma, an open model from Google that generates text through a diffusion-based approach rather than standard autoregressive decoding. The shift matters because the model reaches up to four times faster inference on dedicated GPUs, with a 256-token canvas and self-correction during generation. Related concepts include diffusion models, retrieval-augmented generation, and local inference.
